label: Boxing Glove Foam & Padding Guide
title: Boxing Glove Foam Types: IMF vs. Multi-Layered vs. Horsehair Guide
subtitle: Ever wondered what's actually inside your gloves? Understanding foam types is key to hand safety and punching power. Our expert guide breaks down the science of boxing glove padding.
description: Deep dive into boxing glove padding. Learn the difference between IMF, multi-layered foam, and horsehair. Expert guide on protection and performance.
altText: Close up of boxing glove padding layers
